data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/georg-schmidt-photography-hue/scroll-world-assets/main/stills/scene1-komplex.png\"],\"aspect_ratio\":\"3:2\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Origami papercraft diorama, isometric aerial view, everything folded from clean matte paper, tilt-shift miniature feel, plain white background with soft contact shadow, centered composition. Buildings and vehicles in corporate palette white, royal blue and warm yellow, exactly like the first reference image. Nature: lush GREEN origami paper trees in several shades of green and green paper bushes; flowers ONLY sparse and ONLY in white and warm yellow, no red, no pink, no orange anywhere in the landscape. Same paper world, same lighting and camera angle as the first reference image.\\nSubject: the SAME flat single-story company complex as in the first reference image with its large flat roof completely removed (not visible in frame), revealing the interior from above: one single level divided into four distinct open office zones separated by low paper partition walls. Zone 1 sales: nine origami paper figures (five women, four men) at desks with tiny paper headsets. Zone 2 order processing: four paper figures (three women, one man) among paper parcels. Zone 3 accounting: five paper women figures at desks with paper documents. Zone 4 planning: five paper figures (two women, three men) around a big paper table with rolled blueprints and a small paper solar roof model. Blue and yellow accents per zone, the truck docks with white trailers and blue cabs around the building exactly like the reference. NOT a multi-story building, one flat level only. No text, no letters.\",\"resolution\":\"2K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
